title: Debug AKS workload identity and ACR pull failures
description: Trace ImagePullBackOff and API auth errors to the kubelet identity's AcrPull role or the workload identity federation, not the pod spec alone.
body: Use when an AKS pod fails to pull an image or authenticate to Azure. Do not assume the manifest is wrong. Actions: for ImagePullBackOff confirm the kubelet (or AKS cluster) identity has the AcrPull role on the registry; for app auth confirm AKS Workload Identity is enabled, the federated credential maps the KSA to the user-assigned managed identity, and the pod has the right service-account annotation. Validation signals include the image pulling after AcrPull is granted and the pod fetching a token via the federated identity. Risk boundary: granting registry or data-plane roles in production is human-gated.
